text.title: Audience OKR Template (Indie) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: grading_date missing OR > quarter+13w — violates r5

example.code: { "artefact_id": "okr-indie-2026-q2", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "segment": "solo-founder-paid", "quarter": "2026-Q2", "objective": "Make solo-founder paid tier the obvious upgrade after free trial", "key_results": [ { "id": "kr1", "type": "growth", "metric": "trial\u2192paid", "target": 0.25, "current": 0.18, "status": "on-track" }, { "id": "kr2", "type": "engagement", "metric": "weekly active %", "target": 0.6, "current": 0.42, "status": "at-risk" }, { "id": "kr3", "type": "retention", "metric": "M2 retention", "target": 0.8, "current": 0.7, "status": "on-track" } ], "check_in_day": "Monday", "grading_date": "2026-06-30", "owner": "@ruslan" }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
Invalid — required fields missing or forbidden patterns matched (e.g. owner=='team').
